title: veronica austriaca var. bihariensis
intro: Veronica austriaca var. bihariensis, also known as Hungarian heath speedwell, is a plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Veronica austriaca var. bihariensis include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken orally to support overall health and well-being.
